title: Certificate of completion on background #1C1917, 1920x1080 (16:9) landscape, 4.5 seconds, play once: certificate unfurls from a thin horizontal line, cream body fades in, outer gold border draws, inner decorative border draws, corner flourishes pop in, banner slides down and title appears, seal pops in and ring draws, star emblem appears, red ribbon strips slide in, three text lines appear with stagger, diagonal shimmer sweep across the certificate, seal pulses with warm glow, subtle breathe hold at the end
